creator: mmoll@freebsd.org
text:
I'm just saying that the ruby-ports from the ports collection are designed to work with the lang/ruby* ports and not tested in any way otherwise.

My personal experience (mainly on Linux and OSX) is that mixing any package/ports system with things like rvm/rbenv/similar is crying to blow up into your face. Actually I'm surprised it's working that well for you. :)
